data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for guardian approval.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the guardian approval requirements per service, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. While the linked use case mentions the need for guardian approval, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not provide any relevant information to confirm or deny the existence of guardian approval mechanisms.
gaps: No evidence of guardian approval mechanisms or checks.
